wikimediaapiportaloauth-desc: Waxay u oggolaanaysaa isticmaalayaasha Portal-ka API-ga Wikimedia inay meel fog ka abuuraan oo ay maamulaan macaamiisha OAuth.
wikimediaapiportaloauth-api-error-invali: Ficilka '$1' waa mid aan sax ahayn
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-client-field-: Tan waxaa loo soo bandhigayaa isticmaalayaasha abkaaga inta lagu jiro oggolaanshaha.
Si loo fududeeyo habka oggolaanshaha, la wadaag faahfaahin kooban oo ku saabsan abkaaga.
Abka dhinaca adeega (mareegaha caadiga ah iyo abka adeega webka)
Abka dhinaca macmiilka ama la rakibo (mobayl, shaashadda, iyo barnaamij hal bog ah)
Abuur oo wax ka beddel bogagga
Wax ka beddel bogagga la ilaaliyay
Waxaan oggolahay [[foundation:Special:MyLanguage/Terms of Use|shuruudaha isticmaalka]] Wikimedia. Waxaan qirayaa in furaha API-gayga la joojin karo haddii aan jebiyo shuruudahan.
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-error-consume: Macmiil magacan wata horay ayaa loo diiwaangeliyey
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-error-invalid: URI-ga dib u hagista waa khalad
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-client-field-: Isticmaalayaasha waxaa loo wareejiyaa dariiqan ka dib oggolaansho guul leh. [[Authentication#Choosing a redirect URI|Wax badan baro.]]
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-error-cannot-: Lama soo heli karo calaamadda gelitaanka
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-error-request: Codsigu wuu fashilmay. Fadlan mar kale isku day mar dambe.
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-client-detail: Sirta waa la dib u dejiyay
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-client-secret: Si ammaan ah u keydi aqoonsigan. Mar dambe kama heli doontid Portal-ka API-ga.
wikimediaapiportaloauth-ui-client-status: Ka hor inta aan macmiilkaaga loo oggolaan isticmaalayaasha kale, waa in ay dib u eegaan oo ansixiyaan maamulka OAuth ee Wikimedia.
wikimediaapiportaloauth-email-not-confir: Ka hor inta aadan abuurin furaha API, fadlan xaqiiji cinwaankaaga iimaylka adigoo adeegsanaya [[Special:Preferences|dookhyada isticmaalaha]].
wikimediaapiportaloauth-page-introductio: Abuur furaha API si aad u bilowdo dhisidda barnaamijyada aqoonta bilaashka ah. Wax ka baro [[Authentication|aqoonsi gelinta API]] iyo [[Rate limits|xadka codsiyada]].
